series_metadata.series_description: Cards contain registrants name, fingerprint, license name, registration number, firearm bearer notation, and any other related information. Cards are issued and provided to the licensee. Licensees shall return identification cards to the Ohio Department of Public Safety, Office of Homeland Security, upon termination. These records were under the jurisdication of the Department of Commerce until July 1, 2004 (Series Authorization #800-0612).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three months, then destroy, Paper: Shred
